title: 100 pcs Gift Tags Christmas Tree Tags Kraft Paper Hanging Ornament Gift Tags Parcel Tags Luggage Label String Pendant Decal, Brown
features: Package:100 pcs Tag size 4cm x 9cm ,heart diameter 4 mm,string length 30meters
Material:gift tags are made of quality card paper, sturdy and safety, offering a smooth writing surface for quick and easy labeling
Meaningful tags: the gift tags labels are pre-punched with holes and convenient to use, you can write whatever you like on them, diy and show your creativity by yourself.
Wide Application:Easy to hang with the compatible twine strings, ideal addition for Christmas gift, boxes, tree ornaments, bottle decorations and so on
Chiristmas design : The christmas gift tags are designed for Christmas gift, boxes, tree ornaments, gift box ,ect, verious style add joy Christmas festival atmosphere
description: Hollow heart design, chic rectangle blank paper tags. The tags are nice and sturdy, made of white paper card and come with natural jute twine to tie them onto whatever you are labeling. The kraft paper can be used with markers, stamps ,name tags on gifts bags or ink; the kraft tags absorb the ink well without bleeding. Can be used for favor gift tags, cupcake toppers, cards, scrapbooking embellishment or any other craft projects. Ideal for clothing price tags , marking tags, luggage labels or other DIY cards. The jute twine is perfect for hanging your photos or DIY knitting. Package Includes: 100 Pieces gift Tags 100 Feet Jute Twine
